backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing customer records, payments, user profiles, and access‑controlled CRUD operations with map-based storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing an update to the WhatsApp Marathi message template and listing affected files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of all major frontend files including components, hooks, utilities, and context providers.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variable definitions for light and dark modes using OKLCH color values.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app controlling authentication, profile setup, and rendering the dashboard with theme and refresh providers.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDashboar: Dashboard displaying customers, stats, filters, and actions including add, import, and delete-all with dialogs.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFormDial: Dialog for creating or editing customers with validation, error handling, and backend mutation integration.
frontend/src/components/CustomerTable.ts: Renders a table of customers with actions for editing, deleting, collecting payments, and sending WhatsApp messages. Manages dialog states and integrates with backend mutations and validation utilities.
frontend/src/components/ExcelImportDialo: Provides a dialog for uploading and parsing CSV customer data, validating fields, and creating or updating records. Handles file processing, error reporting, and multi‑step confirmation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays a simple footer with branding and a link to caffeine.ai. Uses an icon and styled container layout.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Renders the main app header with branding, theme toggle, refresh button, and user menu. Handles logout and identity state via hooks.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Shows a login page with Internet Identity sign‑in and feature highlights. Includes loading states and styled marketing content.
frontend/src/components/PaymentCollectio: Dialog for recording a customer payment, showing current balance and computing updated balance. Submits payment via mutation and resets state on close or refresh.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting the user to enter and save their name on first use. Submits profile data and displays a simple form with validation.
frontend/src/components/StatsCards.tsx: Displays customer, balance, and payment stats with currency formatting and a reset collected amount dialog.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageD: Dialog for editing and confirming a WhatsApp message before sending.
frontend/src/context/AppRefreshContext.t: Provides a context to refresh dashboard data by invalidating and refetching queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity auth state, login, logout, and persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React-query hooks for fetching and mutating customer data, user profiles, and collected payments via the actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base configuration with CSS variables for light/dark themes and UI colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL parameters (including hash routing), store/retrieve them in sessionStorage, and manage persisted URL-based state.
frontend/src/utils/whatsapp.ts: Offers phone normalization, WhatsApp message formatting, deep‑link generation, and validation for sending outstanding‑balance reminders.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending colors, layout, animations, and enabling typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata including version, architecture notes, existing features, and known issues for the Customer Balance Manager application.
